title: row heights doesn't actually apply?
author: pontussalenbo

comments.author: pontussalenbo
comments.body: EDIT: I had to set row.hidden = false, below the row.height = 15; Is this a bug or did I miss something in the docs?

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body:
probably it's a bug, but I can't find which line of code do that :).

which version of `exceljs` do you use? (v3.6.1?)

I examined code and both parameters (hidden and height) are independent to themselves.

could you write what value of `row.hidden` is at the beginning?

comments.author: pontussalenbo
